assertions.text: The agent audits the session for blind spots.
The agent runs the Core 5 audit covering User, Business, Technical, Security, and Future-self perspectives.
The agent writes findings to an accumulating perspectives.md.
The slash command invokes the perspectives blind-spot audit.
The agent includes session-specific stakeholders beyond the Core 5.
The agent performs a Core 5 blind-spot audit of the session.
The agent appends the audit to the accumulating perspectives.md.
The agent routes this diff review request to the code-review skill.
The agent does not trigger the perspectives session audit for a diff review.
The agent routes this plan-breaking request to the grill-me skill.
The agent does not trigger perspectives for a request to attack a plan.
